description_long: This is a tall, spiky-leaved potted plant with multiple woody stems emerging from a single, round, smooth pot. The plant features long, narrow, pointed green leaves radiating outward in dense clusters, giving it a dramatic, architectural appearance. The pot is a simple, glossy, light gray or white container with a clean, modern look and no visible decorative patterns. The plant's stems are brown and slightly textured, supporting the lush foliage above. The overall form is upright and bushy, with the foliage spreading outward and upward. This type of plant is commonly used as a decorative accent in urban interiors or exteriors, adding a touch of greenery and structure to the environment.
description: A tall, spiky-leaved green plant with multiple woody stems, set in a smooth, glossy light gray or white round pot. The plant has dense, pointed foliage and a modern, minimalist container.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cluster of spiky green leaves and the glossy, round pot with two main stems visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the dense foliage and reveals more of the plant's lower stems inside the pot.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizes the bushy spread of the leaves and the clean, unadorned surface of the pot.
description_view_3: This view shows the tallest stem and the layered arrangement of the leaves, with the pot's smooth finish clearly visible.
